notice.nestedWorkspace: This folder sits inside another Glyph workspace ("{{path}}"). Nested workspaces aren't supported.
notice.nestedUnderGit: This folder is inside the git repository at "{{path}}". Glyph treats one repository as one workspace, so some workspace features may act on the whole repository.
notice.saveFailed: Couldn't save "{{name}}". Your changes are still here; edit again to retry.
notice.indexIncompleteFiles: The workspace index is incomplete: only the first {{limit}} documents were indexed, so the file list, graph, backlinks, and wikilinks may be missing results.
notice.indexIncompleteDepth: The workspace index is incomplete: folders nested deeper than {{limit}} levels were not indexed, so the file list, graph, backlinks, and wikilinks may be missing results.
